subcategory: info-dialog with form inputs and date picker
use_cases: Display user or business profile information in a modal overlay
Collect personal details with form inputs including date selection
Show multi-step information forms with validation states
Present contact information with interactive map or location features
ai_summary: A comprehensive info dialog component that combines Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS to display detailed information in a modal format. Features integrated form inputs including text fields, select dropdowns, date picker with calendar, and button variants. Uses react-day-picker for date selection and includes Lucide icons for visual elements. Designed for displaying user profiles, contact information, or structured data entry forms in a clean, accessible overlay.
